allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: implement initial backend structure with NestJS and Prisma

Backend implementation for barbershop management system:

- NestJS modular architecture by domain
- 8 domain modules: users, clients, professionals, services, appointments, payments, debts, cash-register
- Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL schema
- Complete entity models and DTOs
- Service layer with documented business logic

Key features:
- User authentication \(ADMIN, PROFESSIONAL roles\)
- Client management with optional email
- Professional scheduling and availability
- Service catalog with pricing
- Appointment booking \(status: SCHEDULED, ATTENDED, CANCELED, NO_SHOW\)
- Manual payment registration \(no gateway integration\)
- Debt tracking \(fiado\) independent of payment method
- Daily cash register management

Important business rules:
- Appointment attendance ≠ payment \(separate concepts\)
- Payments are manually registered only
- Debts are independent of payment method
- One cash register per day

Technical stack:
- NestJS 10.x
- Prisma 5.x
- PostgreSQL
- TypeScript 5.x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
add modulos estoque, comandas, dashboard e calendario

Backend:
- Modulo Products: CRUD produtos com preco custo/venda, estoque minimo
- Modulo Stock: movimentacoes entrada/saida, estoque atual, alertas baixo estoque
- Modulo Orders \(Comandas\): CRUD comandas com itens \(produto/servico\), pagar/cancelar
- Dashboard: endpoints operacional \(top clientes, estoque baixo, inadimplentes\) e estrategico \(faturamento, ocupacao, planos\)
- Appointments: endpoint calendario por profissional, bloqueio de horarios \(TimeBlock\)
- Prisma schema: modelos Product, StockMovement, Order, OrderItem, TimeBlock

Frontend:
- Paginas: Produtos, Estoque Atual, Entrada/Saida, Comandas, Bar/Cozinha
- Dashboard com tabs Operacional/Estrategica, graficos recharts
- Calendario visual de agendamentos por profissional com bloqueio de horarios
- Componentes: ProductForm, StockTable, CalendarView, BlockTimeModal, dashboard cards
- Hooks React Query para todos os novos modulos
- Rotas e menu sidebar configurados

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
